title: Braunschweig, Lower Saxony — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Braunschweig, Lower Saxony: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Braunschweig is a city in Lower Saxony with a population of 249,000. The Lion City of Lower Saxony, a historic research and automotive hub with a medieval old town and a proud scientific heritage.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
